name: Apple and Honey Scones with Sweet Cinnamon Topping
recipeInstructions:
----------------------------------TOPPING----------------------------------
1. Heat oven to 400°F.
2. Lightly spray a large cookie sheet with non-stick cooking spray or grease lightly.
3. Handle the dough gently; over-mixing scones can make them tough.
4. Combine flour, wheat germ, baking powder, spices (cinnamon), baking soda, and salt in a bowl.
5. Cut in margarine until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
6. Add combined apple, milk, and honey; mix just until dry ingredients are moistened.
7. Turn dough out onto lightly floured surface; knead gently 5 to 6 times.
8. Pat dough into a 9-inch circle.
9. Mix together topping ingredients (wheat germ, cinnamon, sugar).
10. Sprinkle over dough.
11. Cut the dough into 10 wedges.
12. Place each wedge about an inch apart on the prepared cookie sheet.
13. Bake for 16 to 18 minutes or until light golden brown.
NUTRITIONAL INFORMATION per scone: 220 calories; 6g protein; 34g carbohydrate; 7g fat; 210mg sodium
